name: RAG Pipeline
description: A flexible RAG pipeline template for creating vector database corpuses from GCS configuration files. Supports multiple data sources and vector databases.

parameters.name: config_source
parameters.label: Configuration Source
parameters.helpText: Source of pipeline configuration: gcs, pubsub, or runtime

parameters.name: config_bucket
parameters.label: Configuration Bucket
parameters.helpText: GCS bucket containing the RAG configuration file (format: rag_{CORPUS_NAME}_config.json). Required when config_source=gcs.

parameters.name: config_file_pattern
parameters.label: Configuration File Pattern
parameters.helpText: Configuration file name matching pattern: rag_{CORPUS_NAME}_config.(json|txt|yaml|yml). The corpus name in filename must match the corpus_name in the config file. Required when config_source=gcs.

parameters.name: pubsub_message
parameters.label: Pub/Sub Message
parameters.helpText: Base64-encoded Pub/Sub message containing configuration (for config_source=pubsub)

parameters.name: result_bucket
parameters.label: Result Bucket
parameters.helpText: GCS bucket for storing RAG corpus creation results and import logs (REQUIRED)

parameters.name: audit_bucket
parameters.label: Audit Bucket
parameters.helpText: GCS bucket for storing pipeline audit logs and execution history (REQUIRED)

parameters.name: cloud_run_service
parameters.label: Cloud Run Service
parameters.helpText: Cloud Run service name for Eventarc trigger destination (default: rag-event-handler)

parameters.name: event_arc_service_account
parameters.label: Eventarc Service Account
parameters.helpText: Service account email used by Eventarc triggers (default: neuroaieng-eventarc-sa@<PROJECT_ID>.iam.gserviceaccount.com)

parameters.name: corpus_mapping_bucket
parameters.label: Corpus Mapping Bucket
parameters.helpText: GCS bucket for storing corpus-to-staging-bucket mapping files. Each file is named {staging_bucket}.json and contains corpus metadata (OPTIONAL)

parameters.name: status_webhook_url
parameters.label: Status Webhook URL
parameters.helpText: Webhook URL for sending RAG corpus status updates (e.g., https://api.example.com/api). If not provided, falls back to DATA_APP_API_URL environment variable (OPTIONAL)

parameters.name: cloudrun_service_url
parameters.label: Cloud Run Service URL
parameters.helpText: URL for the Cloud Run service. If not provided, falls back to CLOUD_RUN_SERVICE_URL environment variable (OPTIONAL)
